requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety and Installation Package
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全与安装资料包
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全與安裝資料包

summary.en: Oman BESS projects should prepare a fire-safety and installation package for the project owner, insurer, consultant, civil-defence or local authority review where applicable. The package may include enclosure layout, separation distances, ventilation or gas management, thermal-runaway mitigation, fire detection and suppression interface, emergency shutdown logic, access control, signage, and emergency procedures.
summary.zh: 阿曼BESS项目应为项目业主、保险方、顾问以及适用时的民防或地方主管机关审查准备消防安全和安装资料包。资料包可包括外壳布置、间距、通风或气体管理、热失控缓解、火灾探测和灭火接口、紧急停机逻辑、出入控制、标识和应急程序。
summary.zht: 阿曼BESS項目應為項目業主、保險方、顧問以及適用時的民防或地方主管機關審查準備消防安全和安裝資料包。資料包可包括外殼佈置、間距、通風或氣體管理、熱失控緩解、火災探測和滅火接口、緊急停機邏輯、出入控制、標識和應急程序。

standards_or_laws: Oman civil-defence or local fire-authority review where applicable
Project fire-safety specifications for BESS installations
IEC 62933 system-level safety references where adopted

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and project-specific fire-safety review for stationary energy storage. These documents can support technical due diligence but do not replace Oman project fire review.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及项目消防审查管理固定式储能安全。这些文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代阿曼项目消防审查。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023及項目消防審查管理固定式儲能安全。這些文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代阿曼項目消防審查。

gap.en: Battery safety testing does not close the installation fire-safety gap. Exporters should provide drawings, hazard analysis, thermal-runaway and propagation evidence, gas detection or ventilation evidence where relevant, fire-system interface details, emergency response procedures, and English manuals suitable for Oman project review.
gap.zh: 电池安全测试不能覆盖安装消防安全差距。出口商应提供图纸、危险分析、热失控及蔓延证据、适用时的气体探测或通风证据、消防系统接口细节、应急响应程序和适合阿曼项目审查的英文说明书。
gap.zht: 電池安全測試不能覆蓋安裝消防安全差距。出口商應提供圖紙、危險分析、熱失控及蔓延證據、適用時的氣體探測或通風證據、消防系統接口細節、應急響應程序和適合阿曼項目審查的英文說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory or project-specific depending on civil-defence, local authority, insurer, consultant, and project-owner requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval and local fire review

source.publisher: National Centre for Statistics and Information, Oman public authority directory reference

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619 or Chinese GB battery reports are not enough for Oman BESS installation fire review. A project-level fire and emergency-response package should be prepared before shipment or site commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62619或中国GB电池报告不足以覆盖阿曼BESS安装消防审查。出货或现场调试前应准备项目级消防和应急响应资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62619或中國GB電池報告不足以覆蓋阿曼BESS安裝消防審查。出貨或現場調試前應準備項目級消防和應急響應資料包。
